title: Fogmog
move_pattern: Starts with Illusory Spores (summons an EyeWithTeeth). Then uses Swipe. After Swipe, randomly branches: 60% chance goes directly to Headbutt, 40% chance uses Swipe again before Headbutt (CannotRepeat enforced on both branches). After Headbutt, always returns to Swipe and repeats the branch.
notes: Illusory Spores summons an EyeWithTeeth monster into combat on the first turn. Each use of Swipe (both SWIPE_MOVE and SWIPE_RANDOM_MOVE call the same method) grants the Fogmog 1 Strength, so its attack damage increases over the course of the fight. Since Swipe appears at least once per cycle — and sometimes twice — the Strength stacks build quickly.
